result.summary: Found 4 issues: one major content/data anomaly with a negative jackpot value, one major layout issue with horizontally clipped game cards, one minor navigation truncation, and one minor bottom nav overlap.

issues.description: The 'Cop the Lot' game card displays a jackpot value of '-$6,266.13' — a negative dollar amount, which is likely a data or rendering error for what should be a positive jackpot figure.
issues.suggestion: Investigate the jackpot data feed or display logic to ensure values are always non-negative; add validation to prevent negative numbers from rendering on the UI.

issues.description: Game cards in the rightmost column of both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are visually clipped/cut off at the right edge of the screen, showing partial titles and images (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERA...').
issues.suggestion: Implement proper horizontal scroll with visible scroll indicators or adjust the grid layout to fit content within the viewport without clipping card content.

issues.description: The horizontal navigation pill bar at the top truncates the last visible item as 'Hot Ga...' without any indication of additional items or a scroll affordance.
issues.suggestion: Add a fade gradient or arrow indicator on the right side of the navigation pill row to signal that more items are available via horizontal scrolling.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the bottom of the scrollable content area, potentially obscuring game cards or content near the bottom of the page.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding to the main content area equal to the height of the fixed bottom navigation bar to prevent content from being hidden behind it.
